title: 2024 Fantasy President picks, debt ceiling agreement, Dollar dominance & more
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros + Vegas recap!

(4:01) Sacks donation strategy, Biden's uncomfortable truth, mental acuity concerns, fantasy picks for president!

(30:43) Debt ceiling agreement, US debt situation, is USD dominance in trouble?

(1:11:34) Book banning follow-up

(1:19:10) Nvidia going for a vertically integrated monopoly in AI hardware

(1:26:31) Biden's fall, populism in both parties

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the 2024 fantasy president picks, debt ceiling agreement, and the potential threat to the US dollar's dominance. They also touch on book banning, Nvidia's move towards a vertically integrated monopoly in AI hardware, and Biden's recent fall. The hosts share their insights on the current state of politics and the economy.

takeaways.text: USD dominance may be in trouble
Nvidia going for AI hardware monopoly
Book banning is a growing concern
Biden's mental acuity is a concern
Populism is rising in both parties
US debt situation is a major issue

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern over the US debt situation, the potential threat to the USD's dominance, and the rise of populism in both parties.
